'''Peta Lactril''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Noble/Legends|noble]] of [[House Barnaba]]. She hosted the [[Unification Gala]] that was held prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Event of the Season|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
